creator: jamil@trojanhorse.ml.org
text:
Efficient implementation of low cost interrrupt driver analog input. Using
the $195 Industrial computer source AIO8-P board.  Direct support for
multiplexing up to 128 inputs per board.  Multichannel perforrmace with
this driver is in the 7.5ks/sec range on a 386.  And 15ks/sec range for
single channel input. Theoretical limit is 30ks/s for this board but
realistically limited by the systems interrupt latency.
Put input cost is about 26$ for a multiplexed system.  The inputs with
AT16-P are signal conditioned and differential with full support for RTDs
etc.

How-To-Repeat: 
Buy an AIO8-P and run freebsd
